title: Fixture Feature Living Doc
subtitle: Deterministic end-to-end fixture
objective: Exercise the living doc renderer and compositor with a small but real section set.
successCondition: Rendered HTML includes identity, navigation, section content, and embedded compositor.

callout.title: Fixture intent
items: Keep this fixture small and deterministic.
Use it to verify render and browser integration paths.

data.name: Universal renderer
data.purpose: Render canonical JSON into standalone HTML with the compositor embedded.
data.whenToUse: Use in CI and local development when a living doc snapshot needs to be refreshed.
caveats: The JSON file is canonical; the HTML file is a portable snapshot.
